title: Add a new member to multiple boards at once
excerpt: Is there a way to add a new member to multiple boards without having to go into each board individually?

posts.author: Karina (Karina Stewart)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to add a new member to multiple boards without having to go into each board individually?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Karina,

Whilst we don’t have a specific function to invite users to multiple boards, there is a way around this using the teams function.

In order to invite this user to multiple boards, you can first create a team (with yourself as the only team member) and invite the team to the boards in which you’d like the new user to be subscribed to.

You can then navigate to your admin settings to invite the user into the account. In order to ensure the user has access to the specific boards, be sure to invite the user into the specific team.

Screen Shot 2023-06-06 at 2.39.20 pm1056×916 49.5 KB

Once they’re into the account, if they search for the relevant board they will have access to the board and relevant workspace. You can then also remove yourself from the team at the conclusion of this process.

Let me know if this makes sense

posts.author: BujinRikimaru (Ronen Segal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Is it possible to implement on Guests Users too?

Thanks.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ronen!

Not at the moment I am afraid, but this is a great idea. You can add your vote to the existing feature request here → Supporting guests on teams.

To learn more about our feature request process, be sure to check out this thread, All you need to know about our new Feature Request process

posts.author: NoyNoy (Noy Malka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !
We’ve developed an app called VisionControl that solves this exact issue!
With VisionControl, you can add multiple users to multiple boards in one click, manage permissions easily, and save valuable time.

Check it out here: VisionControl - Marketplace – happy to help with any questions!
